title: Bootstrap Cave Beads workflow and local adapter
design: Initialize Cave's Beads graph, install generated agent guidance, add Coven-specific familiar protocol, expose local /api/beads reads and mutations, and pin the workflow with a source-level guard.
acceptance_criteria: Focused Beads guard passes, API contracts include /api/beads, typecheck passes, and the active bead records verification evidence.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Dogfood claim: Cody is implementing this on branch feat/beads-familiar-workflow in .worktrees/beads-familiar-workflow. This comment records familiar ownership because bd --claim uses the local git actor identity.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Dogfood finding: child follow-up beads under the same parent epic could not be made to block on this sibling with bd dep --blocks because Beads rejected it as a cycle. For this pilot, follow-ups cave-hlv.2 and cave-hlv.3 are deferred instead; future workflow docs should prefer separate non-parent blockers or defer when sequencing sibling tasks.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Adapter dogfood: live /api/beads POST comment succeeded through the local Cave server on port 3317.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Verification after rebase onto origin/main fcfbdafb: node scripts/beads-familiar-workflow.test.mjs passed; pnpm check:tests-wired passed with 708 wired / 1 allowlisted; pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm test:api passed 115 files; git diff --check passed; live /api/beads GET and POST smoke passed on local port 3317 before rebase.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Fresh verification for PR prep after Claude sync-guidance patch: node scripts/beads-familiar-workflow.test.mjs passed; pnpm check:tests-wired passed with 708 wired / 1 allowlisted; pnpm beads:doctor passed with bd doctor embedded-mode note and bd lint clean; git diff --check passed; pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm test:api passed 115 files.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: PR #2367 opened from feat/beads-familiar-workflow. GitHub checks passed on the first run after marking ready for review; Copilot review requested and nudged with @copilot review.

comments.author: Cody
comments.text: Copilot review fixes applied: GET /api/beads is now local-only, mode=show without id returns a clear 400, and the repo pre-commit hook no longer exits before the managed Beads hook block. Verification: node scripts/beads-familiar-workflow.test.mjs, pnpm typecheck, git diff --check, and pnpm test:api passed.

title: Operationalize Beads for familiar issue tracking
design: Use Beads as the repo-local familiar work graph while GitHub and Linear remain visibility layers. Cave reads Beads through the local /api/beads adapter, not .beads/issues.jsonl.
acceptance_criteria: Familiars can run bd prime, find ready work, claim a bead, attach evidence, and close only after verification or merge.

title: Build Cave Familiar Work Queue UI for Beads
design: Add a Cave work queue surface backed by /api/beads that groups ready beads by priority, owner, familiar label, surface, blocker state, branch/worktree, GitHub PR, and Linear link.
acceptance_criteria: Cave can show ready beads, claim a bead, add a handoff comment, and expose close affordance only when verification evidence is present.
notes: Deferred until the bootstrap bead closes; sibling blocking under the parent epic hit Beads' cycle guard during dogfood.

title: Bridge Beads with GitHub and Linear visibility
design: Keep Beads as execution truth while importing/exporting GitHub PR/check and Linear roadmap references through external-ref, labels, and comments.
acceptance_criteria: A bead can show linked GitHub PR/check state and Linear ticket context without making either external system the familiar execution queue.
notes: Deferred until the bootstrap bead closes; sibling blocking under the parent epic hit Beads' cycle guard during dogfood.
